manualReview.title: Review contrast and touch comfort on a real mobile device
manualReview.summary: The automated layer cannot fully verify contrast, tap comfort, or real scroll rhythm.
manualReview.reason: Visual contrast and mobile comfort still need a human eye and a real device.

manualReview.title: Review hero and gallery crops
manualReview.summary: The current asset mix includes either weak reserves or a compact gallery.
manualReview.reason: Crop quality and perceived richness still need a visual review beyond heuristics.

manualReview.title: Review repeated phrase hints in visible copy
manualReview.summary: The copy engine still flags minor repetition patterns.
manualReview.reason: These are soft issues that benefit from editorial judgment, not blind automation.
